steps.title: Identify the calculation needed
steps.content: The discount equals 20% of the original price.

steps.title: Calculate 20% of 130
steps.content:
$$0.20 \times 130 = 26$$
The discount is \$26. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice D, 26. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
